title: oxalis morelosii
intro: Oxalis morelosii, also known as the butterfly flower or woodland pink sorrel, is a species of flowering plant in the wood-sorrel family, Oxalidaceae. This plant has been traditionally used in medicine due to its high concentration of oxalic acid, which exhibits antimicrobial and anti-inflammatory properties, making it a potential remedy for various health issues. The health benefits of Oxalis morelosii include its ability to help reduce fever, alleviate pain, and treat skin conditions such as eczema and acne. The plant is often prepared for medicinal use through herbal infusions and decoctions, which can be used to treat various ailments, although more research is needed to fully understand its therapeutic potential.
